name: confluence
description: Search, read, and create documentation in Confluence

envVars.name: ATLASSIAN_CLIENT_ID
envVars.description: Atlassian OAuth Client ID (from your OAuth 2.0 app)

tools.name: Search Confluence
tools.description: Search for pages and blog posts in Confluence

tools.name: Get Page
tools.description: Get the content of a specific Confluence page

tools.name: Create Page
tools.description: Create a new page in a Confluence space

tools.name: Update Page
tools.description: Update the content of an existing Confluence page

prompts.title: Search documentation
prompts.prompt: Search Confluence for documentation about a specific topic or feature.

prompts.title: Summarize a page
prompts.prompt: Read and summarize a Confluence page. Extract key information and action items.

prompts.title: Create documentation
prompts.prompt: Create a new documentation page in Confluence with structured content.

prompts.title: Update documentation
prompts.prompt: Update an existing Confluence page with new information while preserving existing content.
